source_excerpt: "Come with me," he directed, and together we moved off across the plaza to a building which I was glad to see adjoined that occupied by Sola and her charges.

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

dialogue_text: My quarters are on the first floor of this building,
source_excerpt: "My quarters are on the first floor of this building," he said, "and the second floor also is fully occupied by warriors, but the third floor and the floors above are vacant; you may take your choice of these.

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.
